title: Vibrant Venezuelan Chicken Empanadas
description: A flexitarian friendly dish featuring herbal and fluffy empanadas with a kick of red chilli powder, perfect for a post workout meal
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl mix together flour and salt
Gradually add olive oil to the flour mixture and mix until a dough forms
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each into a ball
Roll out each ball into a thin circle
Place a tablespoon of shredded chicken in the center of each circle
Sprinkle red chilli powder and chopped cilantro over the chicken
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half moon shape and press the edges together to seal
Place the empanadas in the air fryer basket and cook for 5 minutes
Flip the empanadas over and cook for an additional 5 minutes
